CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick Richard, Esq. 415-398-3600 of Nossaman LLP for Plaintiff Security National Guaranty.
Joel Jacobs, Deputy Attorney General 510-879-0279 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant MICHAEL WATSON, DAN CARL, CHARLES LESTER.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant argues abatement, standing, "Hensler" case, sustain demurrer as to individual Defendants. Plaintiff responds, cites section 1085. The Court cites cases read and shares it's views. Copy of the permit to be provided to the Court. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL WATSON, DAN CARL, CHARLES LESTER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) Plaintiff submits a proposed order.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/LT)

Joel Jacobs, Deputy Attorney General 510-879-0279 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant MICHAEL WATSON, DAN CARL, CHARLES LESTER.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant argues abatement, standing, "Hensler" case, sustain demurrer as to individual Defendants. Plaintiff responds, cites section 1085. The Court cites cases read and shares it's views. Copy of the permit to be provided to the Court. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
